title: Game Development Tools
summary: Top-level catalog covering the 7 PDD MVP categories.

nodes.title: Game Engine
nodes.summary: Core engines for 2D/3D production. (10 tools)

nodes.title: Bevy
nodes.summary: Modern open-source Rust game engine built around ECS architecture. High performance and strong systems-level control for teams comfortable with Rust. | advanced difficulty | platforms: pc, web, mobile | both | open_source

nodes.title: Cocos Creator
nodes.summary: Open-source engine focused on 2D and lightweight 3D with a component workflow and TypeScript scripting. Popular for mobile and web games, especially in Asia. | intermediate difficulty | platforms: pc, mobile, web | both | open_source

nodes.title: Construct 3
nodes.summary: Browser-based no-code/low-code 2D game engine with event-sheet scripting. Fast onboarding for non-programmers and educators with web-first deployment. | beginner difficulty | platforms: web, mobile, pc | 2d | subscription

nodes.title: Defold
nodes.summary: Lightweight free engine with Lua scripting and strong 2D capabilities. Uses a component-based architecture and supports native, web, and mobile exports. | beginner difficulty | platforms: pc, mobile, web | 2d | free

nodes.title: GameMaker
nodes.summary: Specialized 2D game engine with GML scripting. Used to make classics like Undertale and Hotline Miami. Fast prototyping, beginner-friendly. | beginner difficulty | platforms: pc, mobile, web, console | 2d | freemium

nodes.title: Godot
nodes.summary: Free and open-source game engine with GDScript (Python-like) and C# support. Lightweight, excellent for 2D games, rapidly improving 3D pipeline. | beginner difficulty | platforms: pc, mobile, web, console | both | open_source

nodes.title: LOVE
nodes.summary: Minimal open-source 2D framework using Lua. Code-first approach with a very fast feedback loop and excellent fit for prototyping and game jams. | intermediate difficulty | platforms: pc, mobile, web | 2d | open_source

nodes.title: Phaser
nodes.summary: HTML5 game framework for browser-based 2D games using JavaScript/TypeScript. Excellent for web-native games and game jams. | intermediate difficulty | platforms: web | 2d | open_source

nodes.title: Unity
nodes.summary: The world's most popular cross-platform game engine, used for 2D, 3D, VR, and AR games. C# scripting, massive asset store, excellent beginner support. | beginner difficulty | platforms: pc, mobile, web, console, vr | both | freemium

nodes.title: Unreal Engine
nodes.summary: AAA-quality 3D game engine by Epic Games. Industry standard for realistic graphics, large-scale games, and cinematics. Blueprints + C++ workflow. | intermediate difficulty | platforms: pc, console, mobile, vr | 3d | free

nodes.title: IDE
nodes.summary: Code editors and integrated development environments. (5 tools)

nodes.title: IntelliJ IDEA
nodes.summary: JetBrains IDE focused on JVM and polyglot development with top-tier navigation, inspections, and plugin extensibility. | intermediate difficulty | platforms: pc | both | freemium

nodes.title: JetBrains Rider
nodes.summary: Cross-platform .NET and C# IDE with strong refactoring, Unity support, and code analysis designed for professional workflows. | intermediate difficulty | platforms: pc | both | subscription

nodes.title: Sublime Text
nodes.summary: Fast, lightweight text editor with extensibility and multi-cursor editing suited to scripting and quick code changes. | beginner difficulty | platforms: pc | both | paid

nodes.title: Visual Studio
nodes.summary: Full-featured Microsoft IDE with deep C# and C++ tooling, advanced debugging, profiling, and native Unity workflows. | intermediate difficulty | platforms: pc | both | freemium

nodes.title: Visual Studio Code
nodes.summary: Free, extensible code editor with first-class TypeScript and C# support, debugging, and a deep extension marketplace. | beginner difficulty | platforms: pc | both | free

nodes.title: Version Control
nodes.summary: Source control and code collaboration. (5 tools)

nodes.title: Diversion
nodes.summary: Game-focused source control aimed at artist-friendly binary workflows and simpler collaboration UX than traditional Git setups. | beginner difficulty | platforms: pc | both | freemium

nodes.title: Git + GitHub
nodes.summary: The standard version control system for code. GitHub provides hosting, pull requests, and CI/CD integrations. | beginner difficulty | platforms: pc | both | freemium

nodes.title: GitLab
nodes.summary: Git hosting platform with integrated CI/CD, issue tracking, and self-hosting options. Useful for teams needing all-in-one DevOps workflows. | intermediate difficulty | platforms: pc | both | freemium

nodes.title: Perforce Helix Core
nodes.summary: Enterprise version control system widely used in AAA game studios for very large binary assets and multi-site collaboration. | advanced difficulty | platforms: pc | both | subscription

nodes.title: Plastic SCM (Unity DevOps)
nodes.summary: Version control designed for game development with large binary file support. Now integrated into Unity DevOps. | intermediate difficulty | platforms: pc | both | freemium

nodes.title: Art & Asset Creation
nodes.summary: 2D art, 3D modelling, animation, UI, and VFX. (25 tools)

nodes.title: Adobe Photoshop
nodes.summary: Industry-standard raster image editor. Used for texture creation, UI assets, concept art, and post-processing. | intermediate difficulty | platforms: pc | both | subscription

nodes.title: After Effects
nodes.summary: Adobe's motion graphics and compositing tool. Used for cinematic cutscene VFX and UI animations. Not real-time but exports to sprite sheets. | intermediate difficulty | platforms: pc | 2d | subscription

nodes.title: Aseprite
nodes.summary: The industry-standard pixel art and animation tool for game developers. Tilemaps, spritesheet export, frame-by-frame animation. | beginner difficulty | platforms: pc | 2d | paid

nodes.title: Autodesk Maya
nodes.summary: Comprehensive DCC suite for 3D modeling, rigging, and pipeline integration. Widely used in AAA and studio production environments. | advanced difficulty | platforms: pc | 3d | subscription

nodes.title: Blender
nodes.summary: Free open-source 3D modeling, rigging, animation, and rendering suite. Used by indie studios worldwide for game assets. | intermediate difficulty | platforms: pc | 3d | open_source

nodes.title: Cascadeur
nodes.summary: 3D keyframe animation software with physics-assisted posing and auto-physics features. Useful for more natural character motion without full mocap sessions. | intermediate difficulty | platforms: pc | 3d | freemium

nodes.title: DragonBones
nodes.summary: Free 2D skeletal animation tool similar to Spine. Good for mobile game character animation with engine integrations. | intermediate difficulty | platforms: pc | 2d | free

nodes.title: EmberGen
nodes.summary: Real-time volumetric fluid and smoke simulation tool used to author explosions, fire, and clouds. Exports baked assets for engine use. | intermediate difficulty | platforms: pc | 3d | paid

nodes.title: Godot Control Nodes
nodes.summary: Godot's built-in UI system using Control nodes in the scene tree. Straightforward, integrated with everything Godot. | beginner difficulty | platforms: pc, mobile, web | both | open_source

nodes.title: Godot Particles
nodes.summary: Godot's built-in particle system for 2D and 3D effects. CPU and GPU modes available, integrated with Godot's scene system. | beginner difficulty | platforms: pc, mobile, web | 3d | open_source

nodes.title: Houdini
nodes.summary: Procedural 3D and VFX suite used for advanced simulations, destruction, and technical art pipelines. Houdini Engine enables integration into game editors. | advanced difficulty | platforms: pc | 3d | subscription

nodes.title: Krita
nodes.summary: Free open-source digital painting application. Great for concept art, textures, and 2D game art with a professional brush engine. | beginner difficulty | platforms: pc | 2d | open_source

nodes.title: Live2D Cubism
nodes.summary: 2D mesh deformation and rigging system used for anime-style character motion. Common in visual novels, mobile RPGs, and VTuber-adjacent workflows. | intermediate difficulty | platforms: pc, mobile, web | 2d | subscription

nodes.title: Mixamo
nodes.summary: Adobe service for automatic character rigging and a large library of mocap animations. Speeds up prototyping and placeholder animation work. | beginner difficulty | platforms: pc | 3d | free

nodes.title: Niagara (UE5)
nodes.summary: Unreal Engine 5's advanced node-based VFX framework for particles, simulations, and gameplay-reactive effects. Built for high-fidelity real-time visuals. | advanced difficulty | platforms: pc, console, mobile, vr | 3d | free

nodes.title: NoesisGUI
nodes.summary: XAML-based retained-mode UI middleware for games with strong runtime performance and tooling. Used when teams want scalable app-like UI patterns in games. | advanced difficulty | platforms: pc, mobile, console | both | paid

nodes.title: Procreate
nodes.summary: iPad-first digital painting app popular for concept sketches, UI mockups, and stylized 2D art ideation. Fast and intuitive for portable workflows. | beginner difficulty | platforms: mobile | 2d | paid

nodes.title: Pyxel Edit
nodes.summary: Tile-focused pixel art editor built for fast environment and tileset creation. Popular in retro and top-down indie projects. | beginner difficulty | platforms: pc | 2d | paid

nodes.title: Rive
nodes.summary: Real-time interactive animation and UI tool for runtime motion graphics. Useful for polished menus, onboarding flows, and animated HUD elements. | intermediate difficulty | platforms: web, mobile, pc | both | freemium

nodes.title: Spine
nodes.summary: Professional 2D skeletal animation tool widely used in game development. Runtime available for Unity, Godot, and more. | intermediate difficulty | platforms: pc | 2d | paid

nodes.title: Substance Designer
nodes.summary: Node-based procedural material authoring tool for creating reusable PBR materials. Widely used in production pipelines for scalable asset generation. | advanced difficulty | platforms: pc | 3d | subscription

nodes.title: Substance Painter
nodes.summary: Industry-standard texture painting suite for PBR materials on 3D assets. Offers real-time viewport feedback and exports tuned for major engines. | intermediate difficulty | platforms: pc | 3d | subscription

nodes.title: Unity UI Toolkit
nodes.summary: Unity's modern UI system using UXML/USS (similar to HTML/CSS). Best for complex, scalable game UI and tooling. | intermediate difficulty | platforms: pc, mobile, console | both | freemium

nodes.title: Unity VFX Graph
nodes.summary: Node-based visual effects editor for Unity's High Definition and Universal Render Pipelines. GPU-accelerated particle systems. | intermediate difficulty | platforms: pc, console | 3d | freemium

nodes.title: ZBrush
nodes.summary: Digital sculpting package used for high-detail character and creature creation. Commonly used to produce high-poly sculpts for bake-down game assets. | advanced difficulty | platforms: pc | 3d | paid

nodes.title: Audio
nodes.summary: Sound design, music, and audio middleware. (8 tools)

nodes.title: Audacity
nodes.summary: Free open-source audio editor for waveform editing, cleanup, and quick mastering tasks. Useful for indie teams handling simple sound effects and voice prep. | beginner difficulty | platforms: pc | both | open_source

nodes.title: BFXR
nodes.summary: Retro sound effect generator focused on quick arcade-style bleeps, impacts, and UI cues. Commonly used in game jams and pixel-art projects. | beginner difficulty | platforms: pc | both | free

nodes.title: Eleven Labs TTS
nodes.summary: Text-to-speech platform for generating narration and character voice placeholders with expressive output. Useful for iterating dialogue timing before final recording. | beginner difficulty | platforms: web, pc | both | subscription

nodes.title: FMOD Studio
nodes.summary: Professional interactive audio middleware used to author adaptive music and sound behavior in games. Integrates with major engines and supports parameter-driven mixing. | intermediate difficulty | platforms: pc, mobile, console, vr | both | subscription

nodes.title: Reaper
nodes.summary: Lightweight full-featured DAW widely used for game audio production and editing. Offers deep routing, scripting, and plugin support at a relatively low cost. | intermediate difficulty | platforms: pc | both | paid

nodes.title: Soundly
nodes.summary: Cloud-connected sound effects library and browsing tool designed for fast search and drag-drop workflow. Helps teams source and organize production-ready SFX quickly. | beginner difficulty | platforms: pc | both | subscription

nodes.title: Suno Music
nodes.summary: AI music generation tool for quickly drafting soundtrack ideas and mood references. Useful in early production for testing pacing and tone before bespoke composition. | beginner difficulty | platforms: web | both | freemium

nodes.title: Wwise
nodes.summary: Industry-standard game audio middleware for interactive music, voice, and effects with deep profiling tools. Common in mid-size and AAA production pipelines. | advanced difficulty | platforms: pc, mobile, console, vr | both | subscription

nodes.title: AI Coding Assistant
nodes.summary: AI tools that help write code. (5 tools)

nodes.title: ChatGPT / GPT-4
nodes.summary: General-purpose AI assistant by OpenAI. Useful for game design brainstorming, dialog writing, game mechanics analysis, and code debugging. | beginner difficulty | platforms: web | both | freemium

nodes.title: Claude Code
nodes.summary: Agentic coding workflow centered on repository-aware planning and code edits. It is useful for larger refactors, debugging sessions, and implementation tasks that span multiple files. | intermediate difficulty | platforms: pc | both | subscription

nodes.title: Cursor
nodes.summary: AI-first code editor built on VS Code with context-aware code generation and refactoring workflows. Useful for rapid scripting, codebase navigation, and implementation planning in game projects. | beginner difficulty | platforms: pc | both | subscription

nodes.title: GitHub Copilot
nodes.summary: AI pair programmer integrated into VS Code, Visual Studio, JetBrains IDEs. Autocompletes code, suggests implementations, writes tests. | beginner difficulty | platforms: pc | both | subscription

nodes.title: Windsurf
nodes.summary: AI coding environment with integrated chat and command-style editing workflows. It helps teams iterate on gameplay logic, utility scripts, and project tooling quickly. | beginner difficulty | platforms: pc | both | subscription

nodes.title: Deployment & Publishing
nodes.summary: Stores and distribution platforms. (9 tools)

nodes.title: Apple App Store
nodes.summary: iOS and macOS app marketplace. Required for commercial iOS game distribution. Strict review process. | intermediate difficulty | platforms: mobile | both | subscription

nodes.title: CrazyGames
nodes.summary: Web game platform for instant-play HTML5 games with built-in distribution and monetization opportunities. Strong for rapid browser game launches. | beginner difficulty | platforms: web | both | free

nodes.title: Epic Games Store
nodes.summary: PC game storefront by Epic with favorable revenue share terms and growing audience. Includes developer portal tooling and store integrations. | intermediate difficulty | platforms: pc | both | paid

nodes.title: GOG Connect / GOG Galaxy
nodes.summary: GOG distribution ecosystem focused on DRM-free PC releases and community trust. GOG Galaxy provides launcher and user account integration. | intermediate difficulty | platforms: pc | both | paid

nodes.title: Google Play Store
nodes.summary: Android's primary app and game marketplace. Required for commercial Android game distribution. | intermediate difficulty | platforms: mobile | both | paid

nodes.title: itch.io
nodes.summary: Open indie game marketplace. Zero upfront cost, flexible revenue sharing, excellent for game jams and indie releases. | beginner difficulty | platforms: pc, web | both | free

nodes.title: Poki
nodes.summary: Web game publishing platform with a focus on polished, quick-loading browser experiences. Offers access to a broad casual audience. | beginner difficulty | platforms: web | both | free

nodes.title: Steam
nodes.summary: The dominant PC gaming platform by Valve. Required for most commercial PC game releases. Steamworks SDK for DRM, achievements, leaderboards. | intermediate difficulty | platforms: pc | both | paid

nodes.title: Xbox / PlayStation / Nintendo Partner Portals
nodes.summary: Official console publishing portals and certification pipelines for Xbox, PlayStation, and Nintendo platforms. Required path for commercial console releases. | advanced difficulty | platforms: console | both | paid
